compiled_state.title: Document attribution.enabled config key in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Add '## attribution' section to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md. Document: attribution.enabled (type: boolean, default: false, description: 'When true, /dso:commit appends DSO-Agent, DSO-Skill, DSO-Model, DSO-Task, DSO-Story, DSO-Epic, Jira-Ticket, and DSO-Review-Score trailers to commit messages via git interpret-trailers.'). Also add a note: setting attribution.enabled=false after enabling stops future writes to attribution-contributors.jsonl but does not purge existing entries; the JSONL file can be safely deleted manually. Add SC-0 canonical query example: 'git log --format="%(trailers:key=DSO-Agent,valueonly)" -- <path>' returns agent names for attributed commits. TDD exemption: Rule 5 (non-executable documentation). grep -q '^## attribution' is structural marker check (section heading = contract). AC: (1) grep -q '^## attribution' CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md exits 0; (2) check-referential-integrity.sh exits 0.
